name: Kinea Indices Precos Fundo Investimento Imobiliario - FII
summary: Kinea Indices Precos Fundo Investimento Imobiliario - FII is a real estate investment fund focused on tracking and replicating the performance of real estate indices in Brazil, providing investors with exposure to a diversified portfolio of real estate assets. The fund invests primarily in other FIIs and real estate-related assets that are components of the selected indices. Its headquarter is located in Brazil.
